_publications._publicationTitle: [18F]fluorothymidine and [18F]fluorodeoxyglucose PET Imaging Demonstrates Uptake and Differentiates Growth in Neurofibromatosis 2 Related Vestibular Schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: Rapidly growing tumors displayed significantly higher FDG SUV mean and SUV peak compared with indolent tumors using both scanners, with and without RM (p < 0.05, one-tailed t test)
details: Demonstrated significantly higher FDG SUV mean and SUV peak in rapidly growing tumors compared to indolent tumors (p < 0.05) with both scanners with and without respiratory motion correction
